subject: Naming micro-service - Helm chart values updates.
commit_message:
Naming micro-service - Helm chart values updates.

Changes requested by Yuriy. Moved policy password to secrets.

Issue-ID: CCSDK-1307

Signed-off-by: bt2983 <bt2983@att.com>
Change-Id: Ibec80f147ad1f7623b5915afd0072f7add76ef9f

Patch Set 1:

Sylvain/Krysztof, 
Can we merge this patch? Its required for ONAP use case to work out of the box in Frankfurt release for naming generation for VNF, VF MOdule , VM & CNF use cases.
Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1
Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1
Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Pam,
as a policy PTL are you sure that using "healthcheck" account for normal operation on policy is the right way to go?

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> > Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1
> 
> Pam,
> as a policy PTL are you sure that using "healthcheck" account for normal operation on policy is the right way to go?

For the moment, the team simply reused the same user/password for our components as we pushed to rebuild the policy platform since Dublin. We can change this post-Frankfurt when folks have time and we ensure our clients don't break. We can also enable AAF if our clients can now do so on their end also. All was pushed due to lack of sufficient time to test and get our features working.

Patch Set 1:

Kryszstof/Sylvian, Can we proceed with merging this OOM patch?

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2

If policy PTL wants to proceed with those credentials let's merge but I still believe that it's a terrible security practice and this should be fixed as soon as possible for the G release.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

please squash the two commits as I believe they are fixing the same issue so it would be to have a single one to test that the issue is actually fixed

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> please squash the two commits as I believe they are fixing the same issue so it would be to have a single one to test that the issue is actually fixed

Sorry, I merged the parent's one :-/

Patch Set 1:

Krzysztof/Sylvain, Its fine to merge these patches individually. We dont have CSIT testing in Frankfurt release that does CDS --> Naming MS --> Policy testing. Its planned for G release with vFW testing.
Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2
Change has been successfully merged by Krzysztof Opasiak
